categoryDescription: All food-related expenses including groceries, restaurants, and coffee shops.
Monthly rent, mortgage payments, HOA fees, and home maintenance.
Essential home services like electricity, water, gas, and trash collection.
Gasoline, public transit, ride-sharing, car maintenance, and parking fees.
Movies, concerts, streaming subscriptions, and recreational activities.
Gym memberships, medical bills, dental care, and pharmacy purchases.
Clothing, electronics, home goods, and miscellaneous retail purchases.
Primary salary, freelance wages, bonuses, and other incoming money.
Flights, hotels, rental cars, and vacation-related expenses.
Tuition, textbooks, online courses, and school supplies.
Haircuts, cosmetics, salon services, and toiletries.
Charitable contributions and gifts for family or friends.
Health, auto, renters, home, and life insurance premiums.
Contributions to stocks, bonds, retirement accounts, and savings.
Any other expenses that do not fit into the standard categories.
